title: Sprinted
body:
There's a thing called **SPRINT** in Minecraft, If you'd ever sprint faster, what would that make?

Let's you Sprint differently with speed? Of course it does, what else?
- letting you run faster
- press **TAB** to increase your using power, if your power reaches 0, you have to stand still, to rest. But you're still able to walk normally
- also uses more exhaustion



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

adding strength upgrades soon
